Run your whole yard from one screen.

The problem

The counter runs on paper. The books don't catch up.

Most independent operators are still juggling a rate card taped to the counter, a WhatsApp thread for bookings, and a agreement pad that never quite matches the cash-up.

What that actually costs you

  • ✕ Double-booked trailers because two branches can't see the same fleet
  • ✕ Damage disputes with no signed condition record to point to
  • ✕ A till that doesn't match the day's agreements at close-up
  • ✕ No single number for "what did we make this month," across sites
The fix

One system, from quote to cash-up.

Every quote, booking, agreement, and payment lives in the same place, so the person at the counter, the branch manager, and you at month-end are all looking at the same numbers.

  • ✓ Digital agreements with locked signatures and condition photos
  • ✓ Live fleet visibility across every branch
  • ✓ Cash-up that reconciles against the day's agreements automatically
Everything included

Every tier, the full system.

No feature walls. What changes between plans is how many trailers you're running, not what the software can do.

FLEET

Fleet & rates

Full fleet register with rate cards per trailer type, editable any time.

QUOTES

Quotes & bookings

Turn a WhatsApp enquiry into a quote, then a booking, in under a minute.

SIGN

Digital agreements

Editable templates, locked e-signatures, and condition capture on handover.

CASH

Payments & cash-up

Daily takings reconcile against agreements, no more spreadsheet cash-ups.

CLAIMS

Damage claims

Log a claim against a signed agreement with photos and a paper trail.

REPORT

Reports

Revenue, fleet utilisation, and client reports, exportable to Excel.

BRANCH

Multi-branch

Centralised reporting and cross-branch fleet tracking as you grow.

ROLES

Role permissions

Give counter staff exactly the access they need, nothing more.

Pricing

Priced by fleet size. Nothing else.

Per site, per month, VAT inclusive, the same way the rest of the market quotes it, so it's an easy comparison.

All plans include the full feature set. Plans scale with the size of your fleet, not what the software can do.

Why HitchPoint

Built for this market, specifically.

＋Rand pricing, local VAT

No currency conversion, no working out whether VAT is included. Quoted the way you already think about it.

＋Priced for one branch, too

You don't need a 40-trailer fleet to justify it. Starter is priced against a part-time admin hire, not enterprise software.

＋Live in a day

Import your existing fleet and client list, set up your rate card, and you're taking bookings the same day.

FAQ

Common questions.

Is the price really per site, not per trailer?

Yes. You're billed per site (branch), and your tier is based on the total trailer count across that site. Add or remove trailers from your fleet any time without changing your bill mid-tier.

Is VAT actually included in the price shown?

Yes. Every price on this page is VAT-inclusive. What you see is what you're billed, no surprises on the invoice.

What happens if my fleet grows into the next tier?

We'll flag it and move you up at your next billing cycle, no back-billing, no penalty for growing.

Is there a setup fee or minimum contract?

No setup fee, and billing is month to month. Cancel any time. Your data stays exportable.

Can I bring in my existing client and fleet data?

Yes. Bulk import is included from Growth upward, with a template for your existing spreadsheet.

Ready to run your yard from one screen?

Get a walkthrough of HitchPoint on your own fleet data. Takes fifteen minutes.
